id.description: Stable slug; must equal the filename without .md

authority_level.description: Ranked: statute > administrative_rule > executive_order > state_policy > agency_procedure > standard > external_reference

agency.description: Agency slug for agency-scoped docs; 'statewide' for ORS/OAR/EO; 'external' for external references

statutes_implemented.description: OARD's 'Statutes/Other Implemented' line, parsed: what the rule carries out (distinct from legal_authority, what authorizes it)

source_sha256.description: Content hash: sha256 of the whitespace-normalized extracted text of the source (raw-byte sha256 only for sources with <200 chars of extractable text, e.g. image-only scans). Computed by content_hash() in src/repo_lib.py; some servers stamp different bytes on every download, so raw hashes would drift without content change.

snapshot_policy.description: hash-only: the raw source file is deliberately NOT committed (e.g. executive orders — ~700 MB of image-scan PDFs). source_sha256 is the normalized-text sha256 of the committed .txt extraction when one exists, else the raw-byte sha256 of the uncommitted source. Absent = normal always-commit-snapshot policy.

snapshot_id.description: Snapshot basename in _meta/snapshots/ when it differs from id — for documents split from, or sharing, one source file (e.g. control-family files of one standard; ORS sections from one chapter HTML)

content_mode.description: verbatim = complete source text under '## Full text' (required for state-authored docs); summary = curator summary only (required for external_reference; allowed for state-authored only with content_exception); mixed = legacy, valid only with migration_pending: true

conversion_notes.description: What the text conversion stripped or could not represent (page headers/footers, lossy tables, slicing rules)

content_exception.description: Written justification for a state-authored doc being non-verbatim (e.g. image-only scan, binary form). CI treats presence as pass-with-warning.

migration_pending.description: Legacy mixed-mode doc awaiting full-text migration; CI warns instead of failing
